message:
fix: domain JSON case + CreatedAt typing + unified card types validation (#6625, #6626, #6754) (#6756)

* fix(domain): standardize created-time fields in pkg/models/rbac.go (#6625, #6626)

Issue #6625: pkg/models/rbac.go mixed camelCase and snake_case JSON tags for
created-time fields (OpenShiftUser/K8sServiceAccount used createdAt, while
NamespaceDetails and AuditLogEntry used created_at). Standardize to camelCase
to match the surrounding frontend TS conventions (createdAt) used in
web/src/types/users.ts.

Issue #6626: OpenShiftUser.CreatedAt, K8sServiceAccount.CreatedAt, and
NamespaceDetails.CreatedAt were typed as string (RFC3339) while AuditLogEntry
used time.Time. Standardize to time.Time — JSON marshaling still emits RFC3339
so the wire format is unchanged for clients that already handle camelCase dates.

Producers in pkg/k8s/rbac.go now pass metav1.Time.Time directly instead of
calling .Format(time.RFC3339). parseOpenShiftUser parses the string form from
the unstructured metadata into time.Time (zero value on parse failure).

Frontend consumers updated:
- web/src/components/namespaces/types.ts: created_at -> createdAt
- NamespaceCard.tsx, NamespaceManager.tsx: updated property accesses

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(cards): validate install map against union of config + component cards (#6754)

Copilot review on merged PR #6752 flagged that main.tsx passed only
getUnifiedCardTypes() (returns Object.keys(CARD_CONFIGS), i.e. config-based
cards) to validateCardInstallMap. Component-only registered cards (entries in
CARD_COMPONENTS that don't have a CARD_CONFIGS entry) would be incorrectly
flagged as dead aliases in the install map.

Pass the union of getUnifiedCardTypes() and getRegisteredCardTypes() so both
config-based and component-only cards are recognized as valid targets.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
